category_sources: source_facts.description says interpret and import Apple Keynote presentations; official README describes a library and tools for reading and converting Apple iWork documents: Keynote, Pages, and Numbers.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is libetonyek; official LibreOffice mirror README heading uses libetonyek.
docs_sources: Official GitHub mirror README includes Documentation and Building sections and the repository has a docs directory; Document Foundation wiki homepage was inaccessible through the browser.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official LibreOffice GitHub mirror says read-only mirror/no pull requests and points to gerrit.libreoffice.org, while LibreOffice source-code guidance uses git.libreoffice.org for official repositories.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables key2text/pages2html/numbers2csv; official README describes reading and converting Apple iWork documents and supported Keynote, Pages, and Numbers versions.
